hooks.command: echo '[Discord Bot] Starting bot...' && cd CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR && node bot.js status > /dev/null 2>&1 || (nohup node bot.js start > bot.log 2>&1 &)
echo '[Discord Bot] Starting message monitor in 3s...' && sleep 3 && CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR/bin/start-message-monitor.sh
echo '[Discord Bot] Resuming session...' && cd CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR && node bot.js status > /dev/null 2>&1 || (nohup node bot.js start > bot.log 2>&1 &)
